title: DNS record coverage gap: 4 record type(s) not found
detail: The following DNS record types were not found in Phase 8 output: MX (mail server), AAAA (IPv6), SRV (service discovery), TXT (SPF/DKIM/DMARC).  Record types found: A only.  dnsx is configured with --record-types A AAAA CNAME MX NS TXT but non-A records may have failed silently.  The dns-intel SRV discovery module may have been deferred or timed out.  Consider manual DNS queries for missing record types.
